reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the strip container and swap atlas slices for hover, use, and discard states as needed.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_hand_card_strip_5x80x120.png through AssetServer and create a four-frame atlas for the hand widget states.
runtime_notes: Hand strip anchors to the bottom center safe area above the timing bar.
Runtime card data can overlay text and elemental glyphs inside the authored frame openings.
State swaps should not resize the widget footprint so mouse targets stay stable.

context.usage: Bottom-center five-slot hand strip with element badges, cost pips, and hover or commit state changes.

shape.silhouette: Five connected card frames with badge slots, gem pips, and a slim lower cost rail.

specs.lighting: Gold trim and cyan hover light sit on a deep navy card body with rare-frame violet accents.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 1600x120 px with four 400x120 frames.
Each frame contains five 80x120 card slots with even 0 px joins and no overlap.
Cost pips remain legible at 16 px diameter and retain contrast on both idle and hover states.
